name: Procbomber Bench
summary: Visual sandbox for the procedural humanoid mesh generator. One bomber spins on a turntable in front of the camera; a DOM overlay exposes sliders for body-part sizes, a palette dropdown, a reroll button, and an animation dropdown (idle bob / walk swing stubs). Iterate the generator visually before the polish bar lands in Kaboom Crew.

extensionPoints.summary: Change the default body proportions in BOMBER_MESH_DEFAULTS.
Append a new entry to BOMBER_PALETTES with head / torso / limbs / accent hex strings.
